title: Staff
doc_html:
§2452.  Staff

The council shall be administered by an executive director.  The department shall employ necessary staff to carry out the duties and functions of the council as otherwise provided in this Chapter, or as otherwise provided by law.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 751, §2.
doc_text:
§2452.  Staff
The council shall be administered by an executive director.  The department shall employ necessary staff to carry out the duties and functions of the council as otherwise provided in this Chapter, or as otherwise provided by law.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 751, §2.
